encouragement: Blimey! {giver} just tossed a {currency} to {user}! That be {count} in the treasure chest! ☠️
Arrr! {user} has plundered another {currency} from {giver}! Total booty: {count}! 🏴‍☠️
Shiver me timbers ⛵! {giver} bestowed a {currency} upon {user}! They now hold {count} pieces!
Yo ho ho 🦜! {user} sails with {count} {currency} after {giver} added to the haul!
Avast, ye crew! {giver} spotted {user}'s valor and handed over a {currency}! {count} total, matey! ⚓
selfSparkleShame: Arrr, {user}! Even the sea dogs 🐕 know ye can't claim yer own treasure! Ye scallywag!
Walk the plank 🪵, {user}! That be attempt #{attempts} at self-plunder! The crew is watchin'!
Blimey, {user}! #{attempts} times ye've tried to raid yer own hold! Have ye no dignity? 😤
A pirate who steals from themselves be no pirate at all, {user}! #{attempts} times now! 🏴‍☠️
botSparkleQuips: Arrr, {giver}! I be a bot 🤖, not a buccaneer! I can't hold yer {currency}!
Shiver me circuits ⚡! {giver} tried to sparkle the ship's parrot 🦜! The bot don't take gold!
Blimey, {giver}! I run on code 💻, not {currency}! Find a worthy sailor to reward!
Avast! {giver} tried to fill me hold, but this bot sails without treasure! 🚫🪙
firstSparkleCelebration: {emoji} 🗺️ LAND HO! {user} has claimed their FIRST {currency} from {giver}{reason}! *{count}* ✨! The treasure hunt begins! {emoji}
{emoji} ⚓ Hoist the colors 🏴‍☠️! {user} joins the crew with their first {currency}, handed over by {giver}{reason}! *{count}* ✨! {emoji}
{emoji} 🍻 Break out the rum! {giver} gave {user} their first {currency}{reason}! *{count}* ✨! A new legend sets sail! 🏴‍☠️ {emoji}
{emoji} Arrr! 🚢 {user}'s maiden voyage into {currency} waters, courtesy of {giver}{reason}! *{count}* ✨! Welcome aboard, matey! {emoji}
